events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need produce JSON answer. Need assess scenario: Loop checks & wiring, observed missing surge protection on field side. Work through testing/inspection. Compare against loop drawings, ISA 5.1. Need decide pass/fail/needs_more_info. Missing surge protection on field side likely non-compliant if drawing/spec calls for surge protection. Since observed field condition is missing surge protection, and work is tested/inspected, decision fail. Risk? Surge protection missing can lead to instrument damage, spurious signals, safety issues. Could be medium/high. Need choose. In manufacturing/assembly floor, missing surge protection on field side: risk high? It can damage instrumentation, cause downtime, potential safety if control system fails. But not immediate life-threatening. Let's evaluate. Component condition categories: installed-defective, non-compliant. Work stage tested/inspected. Percent complete maybe 90? Value not asked 0. Sound_source etc default empty? Schema says string for sound_source, numbers. We can set sound_source: "", event_time 0, rate 0, order [], workable []. Findings: "Surge protection device missing on field side per loop drawing / ISA 5.1". Actions: "Install specified surge protection; re-verify loop check and insulation resistance; update inspection record." Rationale: "Loop drawings/specifications require surge protection at field side; its absence leaves instrumentation unprotected and does not meet inspected acceptance criteria." References: "loop drawings", "ISA 5.1". Need ensure JSON valid. No prose outside JSON.

  "actions": ["Install the specified surge protection device on the field side", "Re-perform the loop check and continuity/insulation verification", "Update the inspection checklist and as-built documentation"],
  "rationale": "The loop drawing and project specification call for surge protection at the field instrument side. Its absence leaves the loop unprotected against transients, constitutes a non-compliant installation, and fails the inspected acceptance gate.",
  "references": ["loop drawings", "ISA 5.1"]
}
